headline: Global Medical Plastics Market Forecast 2026-2036: USA, Germany & Top Companies Dow Inc., Evonik Shape Future
summary: According to the latest market analysis by Future Market Insights, the global medical plastics market is experiencing consistent growth driven by rising healthcare demand, stringent regulatory standards, and increasing adoption of high-performance materials. The market is projected to reach USD 42.8 billion in 2026 and expand to USD 73.6 billion by 2036, growing at a CAGR of 5.6%.
